name: pattern-commons
note: FROZEN v0 source for the evolution loop. Read-only reference. Agents evolve into families/<id>.evolved.json; nothing here is edited.
provenance: Seeded from bdo's reference board (2026-06-11): cybermap.kaspersky.com, earth.nullschool.net, musicmap.info, stars.chromeexperiments.com, phantom.land, ncase.me/loopy, AI Drum Machine.

families.name: Editorial Craft
families.pin: the difference between demo and portfolio

patterns.name: Particle Globe
patterns.intent: A planet-scale feed becomes weather you can watch — volume reads as atmosphere, anomaly as a flare.
patterns.use_when: Live global event streams where individual records matter less than the field they form.

patterns.name: Flow Field
patterns.intent: Continuous data rendered as a wind you stand inside; direction and speed carry the number.
patterns.use_when: Vector-valued data where local arrows lie and only motion tells the truth.

patterns.name: Live Feed Choreography
patterns.intent: Events arrive as staged motion — entrance, travel, consequence — so the stream reads as story, not log.
patterns.use_when: Append-only logs an operator must watch without reading every line.

patterns.name: Ambient Telemetry
patterns.intent: The system's vital signs live at the edge of attention — legible in a glance, silent until they matter.
patterns.use_when: Dashboards meant to be lived next to, not stared at.

patterns.name: Semantic Adjacency
patterns.intent: Near things are related things — the map's first promise, kept everywhere, or the map lies.
patterns.use_when: Any spatialization of a corpus; readers will assume proximity means kinship.

patterns.name: Stable Layout
patterns.intent: The same data lands in the same place every visit, so spatial memory compounds into expertise.
patterns.use_when: Returning users and growing graphs; deterministic seeds beat live physics on the second visit.

patterns.name: Region as Taxonomy
patterns.intent: Categories become continents: membership is drawn, not labeled, and borders admit ambiguity.
patterns.use_when: Classification with fuzzy edges where a tree would amputate the overlaps.

patterns.name: Genealogy Trails
patterns.intent: Influence is drawn as a walkable path; hovering one node lights its ancestry and descendants.
patterns.use_when: Anything with lineage where 'where did this come from' is the first question.

patterns.name: Semantic Zoom
patterns.intent: Zoom changes meaning, not just scale: galaxy to cluster to object, each altitude its own honest summary.
patterns.use_when: Any dataset with real hierarchy; the wrong version shows the same dots bigger.

patterns.name: Dive Through Scale
patterns.intent: A continuous camera fall from the whole to the one — scale itself becomes the story's arc.
patterns.use_when: When awe is load-bearing.

patterns.name: Cinematic Easing
patterns.intent: The camera never teleports and never lags: every transit is eased, oriented, and interruptible.
patterns.use_when: All spatial UIs; 600-900ms, ease-in-out, always cancelable.

patterns.name: Altitude Breadcrumb
patterns.intent: You always know how high you are and how to get back down — the zoom level is named, visible, reversible.
patterns.use_when: Deep zoomable spaces; pairs with semantic zoom.

patterns.name: Direct Manipulation
patterns.intent: The thing itself is the control: drag the node, bend the link — no inspector panel in between.
patterns.use_when: Editors and sims where the object of thought should be the object of touch; latency under 100ms.

patterns.name: Pulse Propagation
patterns.intent: Cause visibly travels: a change is a particle moving down the wire, so causality is witnessed, not inferred.
patterns.use_when: Feedback loops, signal graphs, pipelines — anywhere 'and then what happens' is the lesson.

patterns.name: Sign-Flip Affordance
patterns.intent: The smallest possible edit — one click flips more-begets-more into more-begets-less — keeps play frictionless.
patterns.use_when: Model-building tools: every parameter a novice must touch gets a one-gesture toggle first.

patterns.name: Sketchy Permission
patterns.intent: Hand-drawn lines tell the user this is a draft world: wobble grants permission to experiment.
patterns.use_when: Tools for thinking-in-progress; polish signals 'done, don't touch'.

patterns.name: Instrument Surface
patterns.intent: Input is performance: the surface responds in rhythm, and using it is indistinguishable from playing it.
patterns.use_when: Creative tools where flow matters more than precision.

patterns.name: Machine Duet
patterns.intent: The model answers your gesture with a musical reply — call and response, neither side fully in charge.
patterns.use_when: AI features that should feel like a collaborator, not an oracle.

patterns.name: Constraint as Toy
patterns.intent: A tight rule-set turns infinite possibility into a game with edges you can feel.
patterns.use_when: When blank-canvas paralysis is the enemy; the constraint is the on-ramp.

patterns.name: Interior Card Sphere
patterns.intent: The collection wraps around you: the gallery is a place you stand inside, and browsing is looking around — no end, no fold, no scroll.
patterns.use_when: A bounded collection where every card deserves equal billing and the visit should feel inhabited.

patterns.name: Fixed Camera, Moving World
patterns.intent: The viewer never tilts: the world rotates and flows past a level, planted camera, so cards stay upright and the horizon never lies.
patterns.use_when: Inhabited galleries and spatial browsers; pair with layered depth so scroll becomes a seamless dive.

patterns.name: Glass Panel HUD
patterns.intent: Chrome floats above the world on frosted glass — present when read, invisible when the world moves.
patterns.use_when: Any full-bleed canvas experience; panels never own the screen.

patterns.name: Ticker Feed
patterns.intent: The raw stream scrolls at the edge like a stock tape: ignorable, but proof the pulse is real.
patterns.use_when: Live systems where trust needs evidence — show actual records, in motion, unsummarized.

patterns.name: Legend as Story
patterns.intent: The legend doesn't define symbols, it narrates stakes: 'red is a refusal' teaches the world in one line.
patterns.use_when: Every visualization; if the legend reads like a glossary, rewrite it until it reads like a plot summary.

patterns.name: Typography Leads
patterns.intent: Type is the art direction: display serif for moments, tracked micro-labels for chrome, tabular numerals for indices.
patterns.use_when: Any surface that must feel authored rather than generated.

patterns.name: The Arrival
patterns.intent: The piece opens with a held breath: a counter, a title moment, then the world assembles on cue.
patterns.use_when: Portfolio-grade pieces with real loading work to do; never fake the wait, choreograph it.
